# CodeVetter — full agent brief

Desktop-first AI code review workbench for agent-generated code. Local SQLite, Tauri shell, evidence-backed review — your repo never hits a central server.

## Index

# CodeVetter

Desktop-first AI code review for agent-generated code.

## What it is

- Local SQLite storage and Tauri desktop shell
- Evidence-backed review loops
- Optional Claude, Codex, or Gemini CLI backends
- Open source (ISC)

## Who it's for

Engineers shipping AI-generated PRs who want review before merge — without uploading the repo to a central server.

## Agent entrypoints

- https://codevetter.com/llms.txt
- https://codevetter.com/api/ai
- https://codevetter.com/index.md

## Product links

- Home: https://codevetter.com/ — Features, pricing, how it works
- Download: https://codevetter.com/download — macOS release
- FAQ: https://codevetter.com/faq — Common questions about local-first AI code review
- Privacy: https://codevetter.com/privacy — Local-first data handling

## Machine surfaces

- https://codevetter.com/llms.txt
- https://codevetter.com/llms-full.txt
- https://codevetter.com/api/ai
- https://codevetter.com/index.md
- https://codevetter.com/sitemap.xml
- https://codevetter.com/robots.txt
